game_info.title: Mob Commander
game_info.concept:
ODDLY SATISFYING GAMEPLAY

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/mob-control/id1562817072

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

ODDLY SATISFYING GAMEPLAY
Create massive mobs and lead them to victory in the most competitive and relaxing game in the App Store!

Unlock all the Cannons, Mobs and Champions in the armory and discover their amazing evolutions as you level them up.

Choose the best combo and rise to the top of the Champions League!


ODDLY SATISFYING GAMEPLAY
- Aim and shoot at the multiplying gates and watch your mob grow huge!
- Deploy your Champions to break through the enemy mob and reach their base.
- Use the special elements in the levels, such as speed boosts, multipliers, moving gates, and many more.


BECOME AN IMMORTAL PLAYER
- Earn Championship Stars by winning battles, building your bases, and winning tournaments.
- Use Championship Stars to climb the Champions League and become Immortal! Only the best players in the world can achieve this.


PROTECT YOUR BASE
Win battles to earn shields and protect your base from enemy raids.


UNLOCK AND UPGRADE CARDS
Win battles to earn booster packs of different rarities and upgrade your card collection.


VARIOUS GAME MODES
- Base invasion: Raid enemy bases and steal coins and bricks from other players.
- Revenge or counter-attack: Fight back against attacking players.
- Boss Levels: Challenge yourself in special level layouts for extra bonuses.


SEASON PASS
Fresh content every month! Complete quests to advance in the Season Pass and claim the rewards.


ALWAYS IMPROVING
A small team of 12 is working hard to release new mechanics and content every month. Connect with us via Settings > Discord.


A PREMIUM EXPERIENCE
Mob Control is free to download and uses ads to support its development. Purchase the Premium Pass or a permanent no-ads package to play without mandatory ads.

Skip'Its allow you to speed up your progress and obtain extra rewards without watching the ads!


SUPPORT:
Contact us in-game via Settings > Help and Support.


PRIVACY POLICY:
https://www.voodoo.io/privacy


TERMS OF SERVICE:
https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/
game_info.description:
Mob Commander is a fast-paced strategy arcade game where you control a cannon to deploy an army of tiny soldiers. Your goal is to destroy the Enemy Base located at the top of the screen while defending your own base at the bottom.

Shoot your mobs through "Multiplier Gates" (x2, x3) or "Addition Gates" (+10) to grow your army exponentially. Watch out for Enemy Mobs counter-attacking from the north!

Strategic positioning is key:
1. Aim for the best gates to maximize your numbers.
2. Intercept enemy mobs to protect your base.
3. Overwhelm the enemy defenses to claim victory.
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Left / Right: Move Cannon
- Space: Shoot Mobs (Hold to rapid fire)
- Shift: Activate "Overdrive" (Faster fire rate, consumes score/energy)
- Z: Launch "Champion" Unit (High cost, massive damage)
- Enter: Start Game
- Esc: Pause / Resume
- R: Restart Game (from Game Over screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Verify basic gameplay mechanics and player survival capabilities.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The automated controller will move the cannon back and forth in a sweeping motion while firing continuously to create a spread of mobs. This tests collision detection, entity spawning, and base rendering under load.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The game runs for at least 500 frames without crashing. The player spawns mobs, and score changes (either increases by hitting enemies or decreases by firing).

TEST_2.test_description: Verify winning condition logic and efficient pathfinding.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The controller identifies the gate with the highest multiplier value currently on screen and aligns the cannon to shoot through it. It prioritizes targets to maximize mob count and damage to the enemy base.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The Player successfully destroys the Enemy Base, triggering the "GAME_OVER_WIN" state within the time limit. The logs reflect the state change.
